name: Kaguya
title: Seaside Rabbit Princess
description:
Why did Kaguya ask Finn to bring her a moon stone? Because to her, the moon looked just as lonely as she felt. However, the moon wasn't alone at all—it could always count on the sun to lend it its light.
Kaguya, a rabbit from space, tries hopping around just like Erden's rabbits do, and then immediately turns bright red. Himiko must have put her up to it—which, when you look past the embarrassment, proves that Kaguya is no longer alone either.

localization.name: Lantern Flare
localization.description: Damage to 1 Enemy, 500% damage instead if the user is burning. Then the user is granted the Burn status effect. This will overwrite other status effects on the user. Allies gain Spirit equal to the number of burning units on the battlefield after this attack. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with burn will also become burned.
localization.selected:
Damages an enemy, burns user, adds Spirit
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Trail of Flames
localization.description: 200% damage to all enemies. 400% damage instead to each burning target. 600% damage instead to each target that is a Guardian. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with another attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield. Usable only if there is an enemy Guardian on the battlefield.

localization.name: Meteor Strike
localization.description: 600% damage to 2 enemies, and stuns each enemy that is dealt damage for 100TU. This attack ignores the Stealth and Counter Stance Status Effects, the effects of Skin passive skills, and Revenge passive skills. Usable if the user has the Burn status effect.

localization.name: Lantern Festival
localization.description:
All allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills are granted the Burn status effect, and will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 30%. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken skills. Then if all allies are burning, the user gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. This skill becomes locked for 150TU after use. Usable if the user is not burning.

Burn will overwrite other status effects on affected units. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will heal after each turn at 20 times the rate as Healing Burn. This will overwrite other status effects including Healing Burn on the user, cannot be overwritten by Burn, Poison or Sleep status effects, and cannot be Purified. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Mega Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. A unit with Mega Healing Burn will be granted Healing Burn for 300TU when Mega Healing Burn expires.
localization.selected:
Burn and Quicken Burn Blast and Burn Drive allies
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Burning Moon
localization.description:
Grants a random enemy the Burn status effect. Triggers after each enemy turn if no enemy is burning already. When this unit or a Burning ally gets a turn, this unit heals 30% of its max HP.

All allies with Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skills gain the Burn status effect. Then if all allies have the burn status effect, this unit gains the Mega Healing Burn status effect for 100TU. Triggered at the very start of the battle if this unit is on the battlefield. This will overwrite other status effects on those allies.

If this unit is burning and has defeated 3+ units with attacks while on the battlefield, this unit's attacks will ignore any effects of non-boss enemies that would prevent the target from being defeated.

localization.name: Lunar Focus
localization.description:
This unit cannot be defeated by damage from Burn status effects. This unit is not affected by stun effects. This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit is not burning or sleeping.

If this unit is burning, this unit has:
- Hold Ground (if this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP)
- 100% chance to ignore attacks that would damage exactly 2 targets. Attacks that target All allies will not be ignored.
- TU costs for all active skills reduced by 40%. This effect does not stack with Quicken skills.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Axe Resist Lv3
localization.description: 10% less damage from attacks by units equipped with Axes.

localization.name: Sword Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Swords in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
